# `api.companies.get_global_geo_settings`

> `GET /companies/geosettings` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.companies.get_global_geo_settings() -> GeoSettings
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab companies get_global_geo_settings
```

GET /companies/geosettings

## Query parameters — `GeoSettingsParams`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Latitude` | `Optional[float]` | no | Latitude coordinate |
| `Longitude` | `Optional[float]` | no | Longitude coordinate |
| `milesRadius` | `Optional[float]` | no | Search radius in miles |

## Response

Returns `GeoSettings`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `companyId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Company UUID |
| `serviceAreas` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Service area definitions |
| `restrictions` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Geographic restrictions |
